primary.description: The mandatory teal. Used for brand accents, active states, and primary highlights. High contrast text required.

secondary.description: Slate 100. Used for background surfaces, sidebar backgrounds.

accent.description: Slate 900. Used for primary actions requiring maximum contrast and authority.

background.description: Pure white for main content. Warm gray (Stone-50) for app background to reduce eye strain.

usage_rules: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Primary Teal (#3caca4) must ALWAYS be paired with dark text (#0F172A) when used as a background for optimal contrast, OR use white text with a darker teal shade for accessibility.
Use Slate-900 for main headings to establish hierarchy.

rules: Headings must use Manrope. Do NOT use Inter for headings.
Use relaxed leading (1.6) for body text.

grid_strategies.name: Dashboard Bento
grid_strategies.description: Asymmetric grid for the dashboard overview.
grid_strategies.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-8 py-6 h-auto font-bold text-base transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-6 py-6 h-auto font-medium transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all

badges.success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold
badges.warning: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold
badges.neutral: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border border-slate-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use diffuse, large shadows for depth. Avoid sharp, dark shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders in Slate-200 for definition. Do not rely solely on shadows.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click. Cards should lift on hover.

landing_hero.description: Professional team in a bright modern office.

login_background.description: Subtle mountain view of Canary Islands for login page background.

feature_background.description: Abstract teal and white patterns for feature sections.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN

instructions_to_main_agent.1_setup: Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette and font families (Manrope, Public Sans).
instructions_to_main_agent.2_fonts: Install fonts via Google Fonts import in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.3_layout: Create a Layout component that handles the Sidebar (Dashboard) and Navbar (Landing) logic.
instructions_to_main_agent.4_components: Customize Shadcn components (Button, Card, Input) in the /ui folder to match the 'Performance Pro' style defined above. Remove default black/white borders and replace with Slate-200.
instructions_to_main_agent.5_pages: Implement Landing Page first, then Auth, then Dashboard.
instructions_to_main_agent.6_functionality: Ensure PDF upload logic uses the specified 'Upload' component styling.
instructions_to_main_agent.7_charts: Use Recharts for any financial data visualization in the dashboard.
